title: nasturtium repens
intro: Nasturtium repens, also known as creeping watercress or kidney vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of nasturtium repens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations for colds, fever, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of nasturtium repens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues and promote overall well-being.
